name: taskly-trello-clone
description: Full-stack Trello Clone — Final Internship Project

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
